settings.heading: Your Art. Your Pad. One-of-a-Kind.
settings.subheading: Upload your own design and we'll seal it under 4mm tempered glass. Every custom pad is made to order, one at a time — precision-crafted to your exact artwork.

settings.title: Desk Pad (2:1 Ratio)
settings.description: Width × Height = 2:1 aspect ratio. Perfect for full desk coverage. Recommended: 3600 × 1800px at 300 DPI.

settings.title: Standard Pad (Square — 9×9")
settings.description: A perfect square. Ideal for standalone mouse use. Recommended: 2700 × 2700px at 300 DPI.

settings.title: Maximum Resolution
settings.description: The higher the better. We recommend 300 DPI minimum. JPEG, PNG, or TIFF accepted.

settings.title: Safe Zones
settings.description: Keep critical artwork away from edges. We provide a downloadable template with marked safe zones.

settings.heading: How It Works
settings.step_1_body: Select Standard (9×9") or XL Desk Pad (2:1). Every custom pad is made to order.
settings.step_2_body: Send us your high-res design. We'll review it for print readiness and reach out if anything needs adjustment.
settings.step_3_body: Your artwork is printed and sealed beneath 4mm tempered glass. Ships within 5-7 business days.

settings.heading: Ready to Create?
settings.body: Upload your artwork and we'll take care of the rest. Free shipping on every custom order.

settings.question: What file formats do you accept?
settings.answer: JPEG, PNG, and TIFF. For vector artwork, we prefer high-res PNG exports.

settings.question: What's the turnaround time?
settings.answer: Custom orders ship within 5-7 business days from approval. Each pad is made to order.

settings.question: Can I request color matching?
settings.answer: We print with high-fidelity UV printing. Colors appear vibrant and accurate, though some variation may occur between screen and print.

settings.question: What if my artwork doesn't fit?
settings.answer: We'll review every submission and contact you if resizing or adjustments are needed.

settings.question: Can I order a custom pad for my business or brand?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Custom branding orders are welcome — contact us for bulk pricing.

settings.question: Is the custom artwork covered by the glass the same way?
settings.answer: Yes. Custom artwork is sealed under glass with the same process as our standard designs — it will never fade, peel, or rub off.
